announce_text: We are mobilizing to Vietzhuo-8. This is a region with Ninetails presence in the southeast. West Vietzhuo-8 officals have consented to the dispatch of additional NTF elements to the region, meaning we are permitted entry into Western Vietzhuo-8. You have full authorization to land at either West Vietzhuo Customs or the NTF Sanctioned Airfield. NTF, gear up and prepare to deploy!
